power_supply_options: Other (custom voltage - may result in upcharge)
installation_requirements.electrical_connection: Final electrical connection is responsibility of electrical contractor; disconnect switches, main fuses, main power leads NOT provided by Mohawk
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power: Responsibility of mechanical contractor to final designated point at vehicle lift

specifications.orientation_note: Power unit and toprail on same side

crossrail_options.standard: Standard length with tracks set at 48 inches inside
crossrail_options.custom_inside_dimension: Set to minimum inside tire dimension of all vehicles

track_notes.offside: Adjustable in field for standard crossrails
track_notes.fixed_when: Tracks become fixed when RJ-25, JS-25, third wheel option, or oil drain pan is used

features: FL-25 fork truck lift data sheet / order configuration form
4 orientation options (A, B, C, D) for power unit placement
13-foot standard track length (up to 20 ft special)

optional_equipment.item: Extra Base Plates for Shimming (1/2 inch thick)
120 VAC Duplex Outlet at Power Unit

optional_equipment.note: Needed only when lifting fork trucks with center tires; requires inside track dimension specification

notes: Some option combinations are not compatible
Non-standard power options may result in an upcharge
All lift options checked for purchase must be listed on purchase order as separate line items
Vehicle data forms should be provided for all vehicles to be serviced
If no data sheets provided, Mohawk takes no responsibility for incompatibility and payment terms are 25% down, remainder before shipping
Inside track dimension determined by minimum inside tire dimension of all vehicles raised
Third wheel options needed only when lifting fork trucks with center tires
